sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa na gam le na min ading hong tawi in
Zogam le zomite hong laamto in
Na min ading hong laamto in

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Pa aw ka nuntakna hongpi aw
Sehnel gam Rose paak bang in
Hong paalsak aw hong paalsak aw

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Zogam lei aw khanglo in thasan in hat in
Upna khuam bang khosak ta in

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Bah le gui a om khut te hong laamto in
A zaw khut te hong khauhsakin
Kawlgam sung le lei mongdong in
